https://hostfiles.frogeye.fr/multiparty-only-trackers.txt
https://s3.amazonaws.com/lists.disconnect.me/simple_tracking.txt
https://gitlab.com/quidsup/notrack-blocklists/raw/master/notrack-blocklist.txt
https://www.github.developerdan.com/hosts/lists/ads-and-tracking-extended.txt
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DRSDavidSoft/additional-hosts/master/domains/blacklist/adservers-and-trackers.txt

# ── REMOVED (85→34 sources) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# bongochong/* (7 lists) — personal aggregated lists, massive duplication of upstream
# migueldemoura/ads-tracking-breaking — literally warns of breakage in the name!
# migueldemoura/ads-tracking — personal unmaintained list
# kano1/Spyware* — personal unmaintained
# hit3shjain/Andromeda — personal unmaintained
# Th3M3/blocklists — personal unmaintained
# infinitytec/* (2 lists) — personal unmaintained
# ph00lt0/* (2 lists) — personal unmaintained
# pirat28/IHateTracker — personal unmaintained
# deletescape/noads — personal unmaintained
# arapurayil/aBL — personal unmaintained
# metaphoricgiraffe/* — personal (duplicate of parsed version)
# deathbybandaid/piholeparser/* (4 lists) — PiHole-parsed duplicates
# pexcn/daily/trackerlist — BitTorrent tracker list, NOT web tracking!
# jamiemansfield/minecraft-hosts — Minecraft-specific, not web tracking
# divested.dev/Fingerprinting.ubl — extremely aggressive fingerprinting blocking
# cybercrime-tracker.net/all.php — not adblock format, causes parse errors
# privacy-protection-tools/anti-AD/* (2 lists) — Chinese, too aggressive
# the-advoid/AdVoid.DNS.txt — DNS-level blocking, too broad for browser
# jakejarvis/ios-trackers — personal, Perflyst is better maintained
# kowith337/SurvivedTrackingLinkWarning — niche, barely maintained
# kowith337/hosts_google_adservice_id — blocks functional Google domains
# farrokhi/additional-trackers — personal Iran-focused (overlap with regional)
# r-a-y/mobile-hosts/AdguardMobileSpyware — AdGuard mobile already included
# ShadowWhisperer/IPs/Trackers — IP-level blocking, too broad
# Th3M3/* — personal list
# easyprivacy+easylist.txt — combined, we already have both separately
# easyprivacy_nointernational.txt — subset of easyprivacy
# v.firebog.net/Easyprivacy.txt — mirror of EasyPrivacy (already included)
# ublockorigin.github.io/thirdparties/easyprivacy.txt — mirror (already included)
# notracking/hostnames.txt — hosts version of already-included adblock list
# cname-trackers/combined_disguised_trackers_justdomains.txt — domain-only dupe
# AdGuard filter_118_optimized — optimized dupe of filter_3
# DandelionSprout/GDPR 451 — blocks EU sites for non-EU users, niche
# squirrelconspiracy facebook-privacy-list — breaks Facebook
# badblock.celenity.dev/* — blocks Google/Microsoft/Apple core services
# Frogeye first-party tracker lists — too aggressive
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
